title: Where's Charley?
writer: George Abbott, Frank Loesser, John Monks Jr.
actors: Ray Bolger, Allyn Ann McLerie, Robert Shackleton
plot: From the popular Broadway show, a musical adaptation Brandon Thomas's 1890's farce about an Oxford undergraduate posing as a classmate's aunt from Brazil--"where the nuts come from." Notable mainly for Frank Loesser's score and Ra...
